---
title: "10. 层级与分辨"
subtitle: "Hierarchy, Resolution, and Graded Knowing"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 10
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 1, 14, 21, 38, 41, 47, 52, 56, 62, 70, and 81 map layered knowledge onto inverse-limit towers, fold-based stabilization, and spectral structure."
---

**Chapters:** 1, 14, 21, 38, 41, 47, 52, 56, 62, 70, 81  
**Omega Directions:** `modular tower inverse limit`, `fold operator`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_10_hierarchy_resolution.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_hierarchy_resolution_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_hierarchy_resolution_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_hierarchy_resolution_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_hierarchy_resolution_infographic.png)
